transcription.text: Oh, the weather outside is frightful But the fire is so delightful And since we've no place to go Let it snow, let it snow, let it snow Man, it doesn't show signs of stoppin' And I brought me some corn for poppin' And the lights are turned way down low Let it snow, let it snow When we finally kiss goodnight How I'll hate goin' out in the storm But if you really hold me tight
